name: Booking a studio reaches a sealed confirmation with a reference
description: A signed-in member opens a studio, holds an available slot, confirms it, and sees a booking confirmation showing a reference code that starts with ATL-.

planSteps.description: Open the sign in page from the header
Enter the email member@atelier.test into the email field
Enter the password MemberPass#2026 into the password field
Open the first studio in the gallery
Select the first open time slot to place a hold
Confirm the booking on the review panel
Verify the text 'Booking confirmed' and a reference code starting with 'ATL-' are both visible
